title.en: More than 500,000 years have changed too much f...

content.en:
More than 500,000 years have changed too much for the human race.

The human race has no shortage of geniuses, and it has the advantage of the passage of time in the small forbidden void realm, so it grows very fast, giving birth to a large number of Dao Ancestors, and gradually batches of Dao Ancestors of five or six heavens, and even a few sevenfold heavenly Dao ancestors.

Of course, those Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors were among the Nine Extremes Legion, but they were also members of the Human Race.

this day.

Ye Tian summoned those six Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors and gave them six forbidden blood crystals.

These six people are all Invincible True Ancestors who have been promoted from the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and they all have good potential, and they all have the potential to be promoted to the Strongest Dao Ancestor, but it is more difficult to master the power of the Dark Taboo, and if they are promoted to the Strongest Dao Ancestor through the Mighty Dao, it will take a long time.

Therefore, Ye Tian gave them six forbidden blood crystals, which could help them condense the power of the dark taboo, so that they could easily impact the Supreme Dao Ancestor realm.

After these six Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors obtained the Forbidden Blood Crystal, they went back to retreat and cultivate.

They had been cultivating in the Small Forbidden Void Realm for a long time, and their cultivation had already entered the extreme of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and they were not prepared to accumulate for a longer time, once they had refined the Forbidden Blood Crystal and mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, when the attainment of the Dark Forbidden Power had improved, they could start to impact the Supreme Dao Ancestor realm.

As a result, the Nine Extremes Legion will soon give birth to six Supreme Dao Ancestors.

In the Black Wind Mountain, it is estimated that there are none of the ten kings with the Mighty Dao Ancestor Legion, after all, those Extreme Dao Ancestors can't easily cultivate a Supreme Dao Ancestor, maybe there are one or two Supreme Dao Ancestors among those legions under the command of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

But like Ye Tian, he could easily cultivate six supreme Dao Ancestors at once, and that almost didn't exist.

Ye Tian is also too rich, even such a treasure as the Forbidden Blood Crystal is taken out to cultivate his subordinates, and other invincible Dao Ancestors are reluctant to spend it on others if they get one, so they try to use it themselves.

Not long after, those six Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors had broken through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor level.

Ye Tian divided the Nine Extremes Legion into six legions, and each of the strongest Dao Ancestors was in charge of one army.

In addition, these six Supreme Dao Ancestors became the six temple masters of the human race, taking charge of one temple and managing the high-level people of the human race.

With these six Supreme Dao Ancestors in charge of the Human Race, Ye Tian naturally had to worry a lot less, and he could devote himself more wholeheartedly to cultivation.

And over the years, he has often visited the Eternal Source Stone Statue, and he has multiple forbidden talents, and many of the forbidden talents are superimposed and fused with the same forbidden talent, which is very powerful.

As a result, the effect of his meditation on the forbidden path far surpassed that of others.

It can even be said that even the half-step domain ancestors are far inferior to his comprehension effect.

Now, he had cultivated one of the forbidden Dao techniques, the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, to the Dacheng realm, and several other forbidden Dao techniques had also cultivated to the Xiaocheng peak realm.

And according to Ye Tian's knowledge, many half-step domain ancestors' forbidden dao techniques have only entered the realm, and there are only a handful of forbidden dao techniques that have reached the Xiaocheng realm, and there seem to be very few half-step domain ancestors who have reached the Dacheng realm, I am afraid that even half-step domain ancestors such as the Golden Crow Palace Master and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor have not cultivated a forbidden Dao technique to the Dacheng realm.

After all, these half-step domain ancestors did not have forbidden talents, and it was too difficult and difficult to cultivate a forbidden Dao technique to the Dacheng realm, and it was not a long time to improve the forbidden Dao technique, which was a talent limit.

In addition, Ye Tian's Endless Dao has also increased to almost sixty percent, and it is not very far from the limit of the Endless Dao.

And his forbidden path is far stronger than before, and his attainments are quite profound, but he doesn't know how much he is still far from the realm of all things, but it must be a long distance.

According to Ye Tian's own estimate, except for the fact that the Endless Dao did not reach the limit and could not be promoted to the Invincible Dao Ancestor, he had already surpassed the Invincible Dao Ancestor in all other aspects, and his combat strength had reached an incredible level, I am afraid that it was comparable to the invincible existence in the Invincible Dao Ancestor level.

Even if he fought against a half-step domain ancestor like Migu Dao Ancestor, even if he was defeated, he would be able to fight one or two.

this day.

A large forbidden void realm was born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and this matter caused an uproar, and the half-step domain ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace were dispatched one after another.

That large forbidden void realm had been reduced to a battlefield for half-step domain ancestors, and the invincible Dao Ancestors and Supreme Dao Ancestors did not dare to participate in it at all.

In the end, that large Forbidden Void Realm was reduced to the Forbidden Void Realm of Black Wind Mountain, and this result surprised many people.

Previously, the medium-sized forbidden void realm was taken away by the Black Wind Mountain, because it was the strongest Dao Ancestor level that participated, and the Dark King was almost invincible at the strongest Dao Ancestor level, so he was able to snatch away the medium-sized forbidden void realm.

But this time, the battle for the large-scale Forbidden Void Realm involved a competition at the half-step domain ancestor level, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace actually lost.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The palace masters of the Golden Crow Palace, the Qinglong Palace Lord and others were all injured lightly, and everyone's faces were very bad.

"Golden Crow Palace Lord, Black Wind Mountain has gone too far this time, and even sent a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, otherwise our Heavenly Emperor Palace would not be suppressed!" said the Qinglong Palace Lord angrily.

"We must awaken those Ten Thousand Realm Ancient Half-Step Domain Ancestors!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord sighed.

"Agreed!"

"Seconded!"

"Seconded!"

One palace master agreed.

If there was no half-step domain ancestor in the realm of all things, the Heavenly Emperor Palace would be suppressed everywhere, and life would be too aggrieved.

Soon.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the others came to a bronze ancient giant gate in the depths of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and opened the bronze gate.

At this moment, a series of voices came from behind the ancient giant gate.

"Jin Wu, something happened to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, you woke me up so quickly!"

Whoa!!

Five half-step domain ancestors walked out, and the aura of their bodies made all the palace masters tremble.

These are the five half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and they are also the five most powerful palace masters in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, they are so old that many new palace masters don't know them, they only know that the Heavenly Emperor Palace has these five ancient palace masters.

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master!"

"Xuangui Palace Master!"

"Sky Palace Master!"

"Heavenly Punishment Palace Master!"

"Thunder Tribulation Palace Master!"

The Golden Crow Palace Master called these five Palace Masters one by one, and also let several new Palace Masters know about their existence.

Immediately, the Golden Crow Palace Lord said again: "Five Palace Masters, if the situation of the Imperial Palace is not good today, the hidden strength of the Black Wind Mountain is beyond our expectations, there is no way to wake you up!"

When the five palace masters understood the situation of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and the strength of the Black Wind Mountain, they all frowned.

"The strength of Black Wind Mountain is not weaker than our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and even surpasses our Heavenly Emperor Palace, before the arrival of the Vast Sea Ancestor, we must find a way to create a Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, otherwise there is no way to compete with Black Wind Mountain!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord spoke.

"Create a half-step domain ancestor in the One Realm?" the Golden Crow Palace Lord frowned, how could this be created!

Everyone wants to become a half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, but this is obviously not something that can be achieved overnight!

"Golden Crow Palace Lord, you don't know much about the true essence of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, ordinary forces naturally can't do it, but our Heavenly Emperor Palace can do it, this is a big secret, but it doesn't hurt to tell you now!" said the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord with a smile.

As the Dragon Shadow Palace Master slowly spoke, many Palace Masters knew what was going on.
